name: Golfology
address: 2400 5th Ave S Unit A, St. Petersburg, FL 33712
about: Golfology is an indoor golf simulator facility located in the Arts/warehouse district of St. Petersburg, FL. It features 6 Trackman simulator bays, a 1,000 sqft chipping and putting green area, and a TV-filled lounge. The venue is designed for all ages and skill levels, from beginners to seasoned professionals, offering a full bar and food delivery from Bayboro Brewing next door. Pricing is based on bay rentals at $59 per hour, with optional monthly memberships available that include 6 hours of play per month.
why_golfers_like_it: Full bar and food delivery available
No peak pricing on hourly rentals
Allows up to 6 players per bay
Complimentary club rentals including lefty sets

food_and_drink.notes: QR code ordering from Bayboro Brewing's smoked BBQ menu, delivered directly to your bay
Domestic staples, local craft beers, and ready-to-drink cocktails available

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, complimentary rental clubs are available including women's, lefty's, and youth sets if you need them.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food and drinks are available for purchase. You can order food from Bayboro Brewing next door via QR code, and they offer a full bar with domestic and local craft beers.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes varies depending on the course and simulator setup, but typically ranges from 2-3 hours per bay.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, kids are encouraged to play, though they must stay with their guardians during their visit.
